pattern: Paper's Phi Invariance Conjecture abstract claims 105 experiments across 2 optimizers, 2 architectures -- but paper body has only ResNet-20/AdamW. The abstract-body disconnect will be flagged by any reviewer reading past the first page.
suggestion: 改进论文写作：注意章节间一致性、notation 统一、避免冗余。

pattern: Statistical power insufficient for null-result claims. N=3 gives ~15-20% power for 0.5% effects. TOST equivalence confirmed in only 6/12 comparisons at delta=1.0%. A null-result paper requires higher evidentiary burden than a positive-result paper.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。

pattern: CSI listed as a primary contribution (Section 1.3, item 2) despite zero predictive value (rho<0.3, p>0.3) and arbitrary component weights (0.4, 0.3, 0.3). Sensitivity analysis tests only 3 nearly-identical weight sets. Flagged for 5+ iterations without demotion.
suggestion: 深化分析：不要 cherry-pick 结果、补充 ablation 和 baseline 对比、讨论局限性。

pattern: Section 5.7 draws directional conclusions from two non-significant correlations (rho=-0.379, p=0.121; rho=0.045, p=0.858). The claim 'cumulative alignment may be more informative' is statistically improper without a formal Steiger's z-test. Flagged since iter_007.
suggestion: 深化分析：不要 cherry-pick 结果、补充 ablation 和 baseline 对比、讨论局限性。

pattern: Abstract implies full factorial design ('7 methods, 2 optimizers, 2 architectures, 2 datasets') suggesting 168 runs. Actual: 84 (ResNet-20) + 21 (VGG-16-BN SGD/CIFAR-10 only) = 105. Reviewers expecting VGG+AdamW or VGG+CIFAR-100 will be disappointed.
suggestion: 改进论文写作：注意章节间一致性、notation 统一、避免冗余。

pattern: NoBN ablation data from iter_005 exists (constant: 87.74, CWD: 87.62) but only 2/7 methods tested. Section 6.2 presents these as evidence for the BN mechanism hypothesis, but spread 0.11pp WITHOUT BN is narrower than 0.25pp WITH BN, contradicting the hypothesis. Presenting 2/7 as evidence for a 7-method claim is misleading.
suggestion: 加强实验设计：在公认 benchmark 上评估、确保有 baseline 对比、做 ablation study。
